listitem.para: * argi = a timeseries or the name of a timeseries (between quotes)

refentry.refsection: DESCRIPTION Prints timeseries. Timeseriess are printed four by four; if they are supplied between quotes, then they are printed under their name; if not, they are printed under the name 'series i'; if there are NA's, a NA is printed.

refsection.title: EXAMPLE
refsection.programlisting: load(GROCERDIR+'/data/bdhenderic.dat') // load Hendry and Ericsson database prtts('lm1','ly','lp') // prints ts lm1 (log of UK monetary aggreagte M1), ly (log of UK GDP) and lp (log of UK price level) with their names prtts('delts(lm1)','lagts(lm1)','ly+lp-lm1',rnet) // prints the variation of lm1, lm1 lagged once, log of M1 velocity and the interest rate (without its name)
